mapper.sql: SELECT id, dept_id, company_name, company_id, alipay_app_id, alipay_public_key, alipay_private_key, alipay_seller_id, wechat_app_id, wechat_mch_id, wechat_api_key, wechat_cert_path, bank_name, bank_account, bank_holder, status, is_default, create_time, update_time FROM booking_dept_payment_config
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO booking_dept_payment_config ( dept_id, company_name, company_id, alipay_app_id, alipay_public_key, alipay_private_key, alipay_seller_id, wechat_app_id, wechat_mch_id, wechat_api_key, wechat_cert_path, bank_name, bank_account, bank_holder, status, is_default, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{deptId}, #{companyName}, #{companyId}, #{alipayAppId}, #{alipayPublicKey}, #{alipayPrivateKey}, #{alipaySellerId}, #{wechatAppId}, #{wechatMchId}, #{wechatApiKey}, #{wechatCertPath}, #{bankName}, #{bankAccount}, #{bankHolder}, #{status}, #{isDefault}, sysdate(), sysdate() )
mapper.update: UPDATE booking_dept_payment_config SET is_default = 0 WHERE is_default = 1
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM booking_dept_payment_config WHERE id IN
#{id}
